appmesh.virtualnode.clientpolicytls.CfnA: A reference to an object that represents a Transport Layer Security (TLS) client policy.

appmesh.virtualnode.clientpolicytls.Cert.Description: A reference to an object that represents a client's TLS certificate.

appmesh.virtualnode.clientpolicytls.Enfo.Description: Whether the policy is enforced. The default is `True`, if a value isn't specified.

appmesh.virtualnode.clientpolicytls.Port.Description: One or more ports that the policy is enforced for.

appmesh.virtualnode.clientpolicytls.Vali.Description: A reference to an object that represents a TLS validation context.
